titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean Robert D. Phemister records24-1-3381
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Laura Finkel

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-05-29 23:55:49 -0400.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean Robert D. Phemister records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. Office of the Dean

did.abstract: Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during Robert D. Phemister's tenure as dean.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Robert D. Phemister was Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine from 1985-1995.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during Robert D. Phemister's tenure as dean.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of the Dean records, #24-01-3381. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Veterinary medicine -- Study and teaching.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine

did.unittitle: College Advisory Council - Agendas, Minutes and Reports
College Advisory Council - Membership and Terms
"Report on Financial Trends for the Statutory Colleges in Relation to the Endowed Colleges"
Report to the Provost - Dept. Reports
Cornell Corporate Contracts, Grants and Gifts Reports
Davis, Brody & Assoc and Russo & Sonder
Space - Allocation and Reallocation of Space
Committee on use of Animals in Teaching
Cornell Days at Goshen Harness Track
Proposal - "Equine Referral Clinic on Long Island"
Proposal - Revision of Hospital Emergency Service
Low Temperature Biology - Task Force Report
Meeting With Ed O'Neil, Boston Airport
National Veterinary Strategic Education Task Force - AACMC
Project - "Attitudes and Perception of Minorities towards Veterinary Medicine"
Academic Scholars Program for Vet Students

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes vintage stationary of Anton Dill & Son, Practical Horseshoer, given to Dean Phemister. Also a brochure, circa 1970, on the Tierärztliche Hochschule Hannover, (University of Veterinary Medicine Hanover)

did.unittitle: Report for Accreditation by the American Association of Laboratory Diagnosticians
Facility Program and Secondary Teaching Center
